mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, bvid, title, description, import_time, status, fail_reason FROM video WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY import_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO video (user_id, bvid, title, description, import_time, status, fail_reason) VALUES (#{userId}, #{bvid}, #{title}, #{description}, #{importTime}, #{status}, #{failReason})
